title: phyllanthus leptophyllus
intro: Phyllanthus leptophyllus, also known as the small-leaved phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating liver and kidney disorders, and exerting antioxidant effects. The leaves and roots of the Phyllanthus leptophyllus plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, or used as a topical treatment for skin conditions.
